title: Enphase Energy Begins Shipments of IQ9 Commercial Microinverters
text: Enphase Energy began production shipments of IQ9N-3P Commercial Microinverter across United States in late December 2025. IQ9 is Enphase first microinverter powered by gallium nitride (GaN) technology designed for three-phase 480Y/277 V (wye) grid configurations without external transformers. IQ Battery 10C delivers 10 kWh usable energy with impressive 7.08 kW continuous output at 240 V with peak performance hitting 14.16 kVA and 11.33 kVA making it ideal for whole-home backup. Groundbreaking IQ Bidirectional EV Charger architecture unveiled September 2025 and set for mid-2026 launch will feature vehicle-to-home and vehicle-to-grid capabilities. 11-kilowatt solution powered by three GaN-based microinverters provides whole-home backup and grid services by connecting directly to EV DC port.
